fallback_answers.background: R. Scott Echols is the professional identity behind World Seafood Producers, SeaTrace, and SirTrav-A2A-Studio. This public profile is being rebuilt around verified CV source files, so it stays focused on documented current work in marine intelligence, traceability, and AI-assisted systems.
fallback_answers.resume: The verified public profile currently supports a conservative summary: Scott works across software delivery, knowledge tooling, and seafood-domain operations through World Seafood Producers, SeaTrace, and SirTrav-A2A-Studio. Early-career timeline details are being revalidated before they are presented as settled fact.
fallback_answers.sirtrav: SirTrav-A2A-Studio is Scott's personal studio for agent orchestration, media pipelines, and AI-assisted production. It is personal studio work and should not be conflated with SeaTrace business systems.
fallback_answers.seatrace: SeaTrace is the business-side marine traceability and operating-system work under World Seafood Producers. The truth-first rule is to keep SeaTrace answers business-specific and separate from SirTrav personal identity.
fallback_answers.contact: You can reach Scott at worldseafood@gmail.com and review public work at https://github.com/WSP001.
fallback_answers.default: I can help with Scott's verified public profile, project boundaries, and current work. If you need deeper historical detail, the cleaned source pack and vector corpus still need review before that material should be treated as fully grounded.
